source: Backup utility golden vectors and shared fake-transport prototype distilled into a pre-KMP readiness manifest
description: Pins the backup and restore behavior families that must remain covered before backup workflow orchestration delegates to shared KMP code.

expected.commonDecision: Backup workflow migration may proceed only after backup-expansion-and-restore-writes.json, restore-failure-platform-policy.json, and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS backup tests continue to reference the same vectors, BACKUP.TXT expansion and default user-file inclusion stay covered, restore PUT command order and payload bytes remain pinned, restore failure aggregation is deliberately standardized or deliberately preserved as a platform split, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

notes: This readiness manifest is a migration gate for backup workflow behavior-family completeness only; the current Android log-and-continue restore failure behavior and iOS aggregate-and-throw behavior must be reconciled or intentionally adapter-owned before production backup workflow code moves to shared KMP.
